seoTitle: Stratford vs Strathfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stratford and Strathfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stratford and Strathfield.
heading: Stratford vs Strathfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stratford, Queensland and Strathfield, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Strathfield has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Stratford (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stratford or Strathfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stratford has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Strathfield scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stratford scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Strathfield scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stratford or Strathfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Strathfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
